reason: behavior_in_task_description fails because tests check for gold-specific literal strings (function names 'githubRequest', 'listIssueComments'; variable 'page'; constant 'DEFAULT_MARKER'; pattern 'rawBody.includes(args.marker)'). Adding these exact strings to instruction.md would violate no_solution_leakage. The tests are text-matching tests that require gold-specific implementation text, creating an irreconcilable conflict between behavior_in_task_description and no_solution_leakage rubrics.
